title: Add scripts/audit-broken-links.mjs to repo + CI link check
description:
During the audit that produced beads b50/yni/k0d/zqj/1h5/4ld, a working broken-link checker was written at .tmp-link-audit.mjs (NOT committed).

Scope:
1. Move .tmp-link-audit.mjs → scripts/audit-broken-links.mjs with cleanup (CLI flags, exit codes, optional JSON output)
2. Add npm-runnable command (or just `node scripts/audit-broken-links.mjs docs`)
3. Document in repo README + AGENTS.md
4. Optional: add to CI (GitHub Actions) as a check — fail PR if new broken links introduced. Could grandfather existing 3,554 with allowlist.

Why: prevents regression as we fix the 6 broken-link beads. Provides ongoing health metric.

Current script handles:
- [text](path.md) and [text](path.md#anchor) markdown links
- Backtick paths in tables (`path.md`)
- Skips http/mailto/anchor-only
- Strips fenced code blocks before scanning

Missing features to add:
- HTML links (<a href=...>)
- Image refs (![]()) for .png/.svg
- --json output mode
- --baseline mode (compare against prior count)

title: Fix 76 broken links in docs/be-track/ (12 files)
description:
Audit found 76 broken .md links across 12 files in docs/be-track/. Smallest broken-link bucket.

Known specific issues:
- docs/be-track/01-golang/02-interfaces-generics.md L935: ./04-standard-library.md (file may not exist or is named differently)
- docs/be-track/01-golang/05-testing-profiling.md L1270: ../02-backend-knowledge/07-cicd.md
- docs/be-track/06-devops-infrastructure.md L102: *.md (literal asterisk — likely template typo)
- docs/be-track/02-backend-knowledge/07-resilience-patterns.md L2016: ../05-devops/01-kubernetes-docker.md (actual dir is 05-devops-infra/ or vice-versa)
- docs/be-track/02-backend-knowledge/02-microservices.md L1999: ../05-devops-infra/01-kubernetes.md (counterpart of above — mismatched naming)

Mechanical fix expected. ~30 min if path mapping is consistent.

Reproduce: node .tmp-link-audit.mjs docs 2>&1 | grep '^docs/be-track'

title: Fix 86 broken links in docs/2026-trends/ (13 files)
description:
Audit found 86 broken .md links across 13 files in docs/2026-trends/.

Smaller subtree, mostly forward references to planned trend write-ups.

Reproduce: node .tmp-link-audit.mjs docs 2>&1 | grep '^docs/2026-trends'

Strategy: same as specs — case-by-case decide stub vs *(planned)* vs path-fix per file.

title: Fix 179 broken links in docs/specs/ (3 files)
description:
Audit found 179 broken .md links concentrated in just 3 files under docs/specs/.

Highly mechanical — small surface, dense link clusters. Likely all in 1-2 spec/index files that catalog planned content.

Reproduce: node .tmp-link-audit.mjs docs 2>&1 | grep '^docs/specs'

Strategy: Open each of the 3 files, decide per-file whether to:
- Stub the missing targets (if foundational), or
- Convert to *(planned)* markers, or
- Re-point to actual existing canonical files

Should be a 30-min mechanical task once strategy decided.

title: Fix 2,475 broken links in docs/leetcode/ (560 files)
description:
Audit found 2,475 broken .md links across 560 files in docs/leetcode/. LARGEST broken-link bucket — likely structural/architectural issue, not just path typos.

Top patterns:
- 459 references to docs/leetcode/company-wise/other-companies/index.md (missing — file or whole subtree never created)
- 44 refs to docs/leetcode/00-table-of-contents.md (missing)
- 39 refs to docs/leetcode/00-patterns-index.md (missing)
- 35 refs to docs/leetcode/index.md (missing)
- Hundreds of refs from category READMEs (e.g., docs/leetcode/array/README.md alone has 337 broken refs to problems/0X-*.md files that don't exist)

Inspection: docs/leetcode/array/index.md exists, but README.md links to problems/0XX-*.md files that aren't in tree. Likely the READMEs are catalog/aspirational lists for problems intended to be created but never were. Could also indicate a previous reorganization moved/deleted a 'problems/' subdirectory.

Reproduce: node .tmp-link-audit.mjs docs 2>&1 | grep '^docs/leetcode'

Strategy decisions REQUIRED before fix work:
A) Aspirational catalog → keep links, mark as planned (convert [text](path.md) → text *(planned)*)
B) Stub all referenced problems → ~2,000 empty stub files (BAD)
C) Strip the catalogs from READMEs and rebuild from actual files in tree
D) Investigate: was there a problems/ subdir deleted in git history? Restore if so.

This bead is large; recommend further decomposition after strategy decision.

title: Fix 344 broken links in docs/shared/ (mostly path-prefix bugs)
description:
Audit found 344 broken .md links across 30 files in docs/shared/.

DOMINANT PATTERN (~200+ of 344): nested-docs path bug.
Files under docs/shared/07-company-guides/ contain links like 'docs/fe-track/...' which resolve to docs/shared/07-company-guides/docs/fe-track/... (double docs/ prefix).

Examples (each 12× referenced):
- docs/shared/07-company-guides/docs/fe-track/02-typescript/04-typescript-comprehensive.md
- docs/shared/07-company-guides/docs/fe-track/06-browser-performance/02-react-performance.md
- docs/shared/07-company-guides/docs/be-track/01-golang/01-language-fundamentals.md
- (and many more)

Fix: sed across docs/shared/07-company-guides/**/*.md replacing 'docs/' prefix with '../../' (relative to docs/shared/07-company-guides/).
Same pattern likely in docs/shared/04-security/ (11 refs to 'be-track/...').

Other patterns: 7 refs to docs/shared/06-ai-and-agents/04-rag.md (actual file is 04-rag-and-embeddings.md — rename/redirect needed).

Reproduce: node .tmp-link-audit.mjs docs 2>&1 | grep '^docs/shared'

Strategy:
1. Bulk sed fix for 'docs/' prefix → '../../' inside 07-company-guides
2. Same for 04-security/
3. Add redirect or fix path for 04-rag.md → 04-rag-and-embeddings.md
4. Mop up long tail

title: Fix 359 broken links in docs/fe-track/
description:
Audit (commit-pending) found 359 broken .md links across 137 files in docs/fe-track/.

Top patterns:
- 121 references to missing docs/fe-track/00-table-of-contents.md → likely should point to docs/00-table-of-contents.md (../). Mechanical fix via sed across all 137 files.
- 9 refs to docs/fe-track/modules/14-advanced-expert.md (missing — needs stub or path fix)
- 8 refs each to docs/fe-track/modules/10-cs-fundamentals.md, docs/fe-track/02-typescript/01-type-system-basics.md
- 7 refs each to docs/fe-track/01-javascript/06-event-loop-async.md (actual file is 07-event-loop-async.md), 07-es6-features.md (actual is 08-es6-features.md), 02-scope-hoisting-comprehensive.md
- Long tail of small-count typos and renamed files

Audit script saved at .tmp-link-audit.mjs (not committed).
Reproduce: node .tmp-link-audit.mjs docs 2>&1 | grep '^docs/fe-track'

Strategy:
1. First pass: bulk sed for the TOC path fix (121 → 0)
2. Second pass: identify which 0X-*.md numbering shifted in 01-javascript/ and bulk-fix references
3. Third pass: stub or path-fix the remaining ~50 unique missing targets
4. Verify with audit script (target: 0 broken in fe-track/)

title: Populate docs/fe-track/12-behavioral/ content
description:
Directory only has README.md and mindmap-behavioral.md. Roadmap references many missing files (e.g. 01-star-method.md and others under 12-behavioral/).

Suggested files (verify against roadmap rows):
- 01-star-method.md (STAR storytelling framework)
- Cross-reference all roadmap rows pointing to 12-behavioral/*

Could be tackled together with the broken-paths issue or independently.
close_reason: Done in 079fd85. No authoring needed — all 4 behavioral files (2,400+ lines) already exist at docs/shared/09-behavioral/. Local README already redirects there. Roadmap relinked via 478.

title: Fix 22 broken paths in fe-track/00-study-roadmap.md
description:
Roadmap references files that don't exist on disk. Either create stub files or remove the rows.

Known broken paths (incomplete list):
- 09-advanced-topics/01-data-structures-js.md
- 09-advanced-topics/* (multiple)
- 12-behavioral/01-star-method.md
- 12-behavioral/* (multiple — dir only has README.md and mindmap-behavioral.md)
- shared/* (several paths)

Audit command: grep -oE '\[.+\]\([^)]+\.md\)' docs/fe-track/00-study-roadmap.md, then test each path with ls.

Decision needed: stub vs remove (per row or per section).
close_reason: Done in 079fd85. 22→0 broken paths. 21 re-pointed to existing canonical locations, 1 stub created (modules/00-knowledge-map.md).

title: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore
description: macOS .DS_Store files are currently tracked and show as dirty in git status. Add to .gitignore and run 'git rm --cached' on existing tracked ones.
close_reason: Done in 079fd85. .gitignore updated; .DS_Store and docs/.DS_Store untracked.
